title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS libraries to pull, bundle, and run Llama-2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models via simple async/sync client.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; chat, generate, embed with fetch or WebSocket streams.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLM or embeddings in chains, agents, RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama: multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG uploads, admin panel.

title: ollama-cli (mattw/ollama-cli)
summary: Interactive TUI wrapper around ollama with chat history, syntax highlighting, prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot (sugarforever/ollama-copilot)
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into inline code copilot with explain, refactor, test generation.

title: ollama-helm (otwld/ollama-helm)
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support, PVC, autoscaling.

title: ollama-rag (hmccarty/ollama-rag)
summary: Minimal RAG starter: ingest PDFs → Chroma → Ollama embeddings & chat; runs locally with Docker Compose.

title: ollama4j (ollama4j/ollama4j)
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with synchronous, reactive and Kotlin-coroutine flavors.

title: ollama-chat (jakobhoeg/ollama-chat)
summary: Next.js 14 chat app using Ollama API, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, server-sent events for streaming.

title: ollama-codex (go-skynet/ollama-codex)
summary: Drop-in replacement for OpenAI Codex using Ollama backend; provides /v1/completions for IDEs.

title: ollama-obsidian (joethei/ollama-obsidian)
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLMs via Ollama for note summarization, brainstorming, translation.

title: ollama-nim (mattgle/ollama-nim)
summary: Nim client library for Ollama with async HTTP, streaming chat, and model management routines.

title: ollama-discord (rizerphe/ollama-discord)
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models to any server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-django (nigel-daniels/ollama-django)
summary: Django package adding Ollama LLM & embedding backends for Django-AI integrations and admin chat.

title: ollama-laravel (ziming/ollama-laravel)
summary: Laravel wrapper providing a fluent facade to chat, generate, embed, and manage Ollama models.

title: ollama-rust (pepperoni21/ollama-rust)
summary: Rust crate for Ollama with reqwest, tokio streams, and strongly-typed request/response structs.

title: ollama-csharp (awaescher/ollama-csharp)
summary: .NET 8 client library for Ollama with IAsyncEnumerable streaming, dependency injection, and Polly retries.

title: ollama-slack (kristian/ollama-slack)
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server forwarding channel messages to Ollama and streaming replies back.
